name: Linux Desktop + VNC (One File)
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'sudo apt update -y && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo apt install -y xfce4 xfce4-goodies x11vnc xvfb novnc websockify dbus-x11 && mkdir -p ~/.vnc && echo "123456" | vncpasswd -f > ~/.vnc/passwd && chmod 600 ~/.vnc/passwd && echo "✅ التثبيت اكتمل!"
